title: Inventory management with QR codes

posts.author: jeromeskiply (Jerome Chambard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!
Today, we issued a new fetaure of our QR code App. You can now manage your inventory with QR codes.

image1731×605 75.2 KB

When you create an item, a associated QR code is created. You can place it on the corresponding racking.
Each time a worker scan the qr code, he can update the stock level of the item, without any app, just with a simple virtual keyboard.
You can activate geofencing to protect yourself from outside.
Read the doc

posts.author: Bkostinsky (Brandon)
posts.cookedHtml: This is awesome! Thanks so much for adding this!

posts.author: zaneta (Zaneta Grant)
posts.cookedHtml: This is amazing, Jerome! Thanks for this contribution
